answer: The convention site is https://tetheredtogether.net/. Alongside rope-focused workshops and broader arts, movement, relationship, and kink programming, its Ropenspace is participant-driven: attendees propose interests and move among evolving classes, discussions, and hands-on skill shares.
evidence:

Its Ropenspace uses a facilitated, self-organizing Open Space process in which participants propose questions or interests and move among evolving classes, discussions, and hands-on skill shares.
